Ontological.material (10) ties to its physical manifestation as sound. Symmetry.destructive (5) captures its disruptive quality, while lawfulness.predictable (5) aligns with its repetitive patterns.

Yawp resonates most with physical, individual expression (ontological.material, scale.individual) and sensory immediacy (epistemological.perception).
